description_long: This is a young adult female with a slender build, standing upright with arms extended horizontally in a T-pose. She is wearing a two-piece bikini with a striped pattern, featuring bows on the sides of the bottoms and a halter-style top. Her hair is styled in high twin ponytails, each tied with a ribbon, and her facial features are soft and youthful. The figure is barefoot, with well-defined toes and fingers, and the skin surface appears smooth and naturalistic. The overall appearance is casual and summery, suitable for beach or poolside urban environments. No accessories or carried objects are visible.
description: A young adult female in a striped bikini, standing in a T-pose with twin ponytails and barefoot, displaying a casual summer look.
description_view_0: Front view showing facial features, bikini top, and bows on the bikini bottom sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, chest, and the side ties of the bikini bottom.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the bikini, hair tied in twin ponytails, and the back of the legs.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the body, similar to the left side, with visible bikini side ties.
attribute_clothing_type: bikini with halter top and side-tie bottoms
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
attribute_hairstyle: long hair in high twin ponytails
